docket_entries.description: ROOM 608; JDG TMASON; CLRK JDACASIN; RPRT LEE BATARA; DEFT. NOT PRESENT; JURY TRIAL STRIKEN; REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-03-2002 -.
